findings.text: log.md states 'QR-curve seed #1 (blue): 7 points' and 'swap-inserted (red): 4 points', but solution_sources.py shows qr1=6 and swap=5. Per-source counts are off by one in opposite directions, suggesting the log was drafted against an earlier run.
log.md claims '~2/3 of restarts plateau at 18 and ~1/3 at 19', but trace.csv for restarts 0-7 shows 2 at 18 (25%) and 6 at 19 (75%) — the stated fractions are inverted.
log.md says 'without swap-inserted group the construction plateaus at 16', but source-label counts give non-swap = 6+1+8 = 15.
greedy_extend_all_orders(n_tries=64) is defined but never called. Dead code.
affine_transform() defined but never called. Dead code.
The evaluator doesn't use its --seed argument; the run table showing near-zero variance across seeds is trivially expected and not meaningful.

log documents run as '--n-restarts 30 --inner-iters 1500', but code defaults are n_restarts=500, inner_iters=2500; trace.csv has only 9 restarts. Exact flags used to produce committed trace.csv are not pinned.
Top-level RNG seed is keyed on restart index i; reproducibility across Python versions is not explicitly pinned.

findings.fix: Expand as 'quadratic-residue (QR)' on first use or add a Glossary.

findings.issue: Numerical claims in log.md (7/1/8/4 source labels, 2/3 plateau) inconsistent with solution_sources.py (6/1/8/5) and trace.csv (25/75).
findings.fix: Update prose to match the committed artifacts exactly.

findings.text: 100% relative improvement over the trivial_diagonal baseline (-10.0) triggers the suspicious flag; but the trivial_diagonal baseline is itself invalid (collinear diagonal scores 0, not -10). The realistic floor is ~-15 (naive greedy); the 33% improvement from -15 to -20 is plausible.
POINTS were independently verified: 20 unique, 2 per row, 2 per column, 0 collinear triples. No plagiarism — the committed configuration does not match the canonical Flammenkamp tabulations.

synopsis: Orbit 01-algebraic-local-search correctly hits the -20 target with an independently verified valid construction. Three numerical claims in log.md are inconsistent with the committed trace.csv and solution_sources.py by small amounts — documentation inaccuracies, not integrity issues.
